title: Artists and Models Abroad
writer: Howard Lindsay, Russel Crouse, Ken Englund
actors: Jack Benny, Joan Bennett, Mary Boland
plot: Buck Boswell and his all-girl troupe are stranded in Paris, but Buck manages to con the manager of the 'Hotel de Navarre' in furnishing accommodations for his group, but the proprietor's wife locks them out. In his search for fund...
